meaning: n.转变,转换,跃迁,过渡,变调
examples: The transition from school to work can be difficult.
The French say they favour a transition to democracy.
Inevitably the transition will yield some sticky moments.
An award-winning journalist, he has managed media projects in over 45 countries in transition since 1992.
At the same time, I sought to discern the point around which my own transition would pivot.
